message:
Add bidirectional lens sub-issues (bd-1t7l.1–4) to beads tracker

Add four new sub-issues under the DiagramLens epic for bidirectional
text-to-diagram transformations:
- bd-1t7l.1: ParseLens (text <-> AST with formatting complement)
- bd-1t7l.2: LayoutLens (AST <-> positioned graph with ordering complement)
- bd-1t7l.3: Full DiagramLens pipeline composition with end-to-end editing
- bd-1t7l.4: Property test suite verifying lens laws (GetPut, PutGet, PutPut)

Also re-serializes 12 existing issue entries with updated descriptions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
